completion_summary: Aligned training/evaluation action numerics under contract 0.3, froze and executed a 20k PPO/SAC Train/Dev screening, retained exact replay evidence, rejected PPO escalation, and selected SAC for conditional 100k scaling while retaining its numerical-domain failures and compute cost.
notes: Development-only flow task screening; no Bench access, no formal ranking, and no 100k/1M escalation unless the preregistered gate passes.
scope: Align RL training and replay action numerics, then run a frozen 20k Train/Dev screening stage before any larger compute
